<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
</head>

<body>

<h1>🚀 Pull Request</h1>

<h2>📌 Description</h2>
<p>Describe what this PR does:</p>
<ul>
  <li>What is added/changed/fixed?</li>
  <li>Why is this change needed?</li>
</ul>

<h2>🧩 Type of Contribution</h2>
<ul>
  <li>☐ ✨ New Feature</li>
  <li>☐ 🐛 Bug Fix</li>
  <li>☐ 📚 Documentation Update</li>
  <li>☐ ♻️ Code Refactor</li>
  <li>☐ ✅ Test Cases</li>
  <li>☐ 🔧 Other</li>
</ul>

<h2>📂 Related Topic</h2>
<p>Examples: Basics, OOP, Collections, Exception Handling, File Handling, etc.</p>

<h2>🧪 Changes Made</h2>
<ul>
  <li>➕ Added new Java program (basic/advanced concept)</li>
  <li>✏️ Improved code readability and structure</li>
  <li>🧹 Refactored existing code for better clarity</li>
  <li>🐛 Fixed logical or runtime errors</li>
  <li>📚 Added comments/documentation for better understanding</li>
  <li>📂 Organized files into proper folders</li>
  <li>⚡ Optimized code for better performance (if applicable)</li>
</ul>

<h2>✅ Checklist</h2>
<ul>
  <li>☐ Code follows project guidelines</li>
  <li>☐ Code is tested and working properly</li>
  <li>☐ Proper formatting is maintained</li>
  <li>☐ File is placed in the correct folder</li>
  <li>☐ No duplicate or unnecessary content</li>
</ul>

<h2>📸 Screenshots (if applicable)</h2>
<p>Add screenshots here if needed.</p>

<h2>💡 Additional Notes</h2>
<p>Any extra information.</p>

<h2>🙌 Contribution Summary</h2>
<p>One-line summary of your PR.</p>

</body>
</html>
